title: NDIC Management Pays Courtesy Visit to FCT High Court Chief Judge - FinancialEDGE
description: The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) management team paid a courtesy visit to the Chief Judge of the FCT High Court, Honourable Justice Husseini Baba-Yusuf, in Abuja. html:
The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) management team paid a courtesy visit to the Chief Judge of the FCT High Court, Honourable Justice Husseini Baba-Yusuf, in Abuja. The visit was led by the MD/CE of NDIC, Bello Hassan, who presented the NDIC’s research publications to the Chief Judge.

The NDIC team included Executive Director Operations, Mr. Mustapha M. Ibrahim; Executive Director Corporate Services, Mrs. Emily C. Osuji; Head Legal, Mr. Henry Fomah; and Ag. Head Communication and Public Affairs, Ms. Hawwau Gambo. They were received by Honourable Justice S. C. Orji, Honourable Justice M. F. Anenih, and Honourable Justice H. Muazu.

The visit aimed to strengthen the relationship between the NDIC and the FCT High Court, and to promote cooperation in areas of mutual interest.
